stemHtml: Complete the sentence correctly. When turning right from 330° to 040° in the Northern Hemisphere, the direct reading magnetic compass will?

options.a: under-indicate the turn and liquid swirl will decrease the effect.
options.b: under-indicate the turn and liquid swirl will increase the effect.
options.c: over-indicate the turn and liquid swirl will decrease the effect.
options.d: over-indicate the turn and liquid swirl will increase the effect.
